name: Spike
description: Spike — Crypto payment gateway supporting Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, and stablecoin payments for online merchants via hosted checkout.

seo.title: Spike — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Spike: Spike — Crypto payment gateway supporting Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, and stablecoin payments for online merchants via hosted checkout.

when_to_use: Accepting Bitcoin and USDT at hosted crypto checkout
Stablecoin payment integration for digital goods merchants
Crypto invoice generation and payment confirmation via API

pros: Accepts BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC out of box
Hosted checkout avoids PCI-style crypto handling
cons: Limited brand trust vs BitPay or Coinbase Commerce
Crypto regulatory uncertainty in many regions
Settlement fiat options may be restricted
Niche use case — few buyers pay in crypto
review.verdict: Workable hosted crypto checkout for niche merchants, but brand recognition and regulatory fit lag competitors.
review.best_for: Merchants in crypto-friendly niches wanting hosted stablecoin checkout
review.not_for: Mainstream retailers whose customers pay with cards

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
